mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary policy that reduces borrowing costs and boosts equity valuations, generating positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns remain negative in 70%+ of periods when FEDFUNDS declines by >0.5% over 3 months.

mechanism_narrative: Strong payroll growth (PAYEMS) indicates robust labor market conditions that support consumer spending and corporate earnings, driving positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns are negative in 60%+ of months with PAYEMS growth >100k.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in industrial production (INDPRO) and GDP (GDPC1) signals strong manufacturing activity and economic expansion, creating positive momentum in S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 60d returns are negative when both INDPRO and GDPC1 show positive growth in the same quarter.

mechanism_narrative: Persistent inflation above 210.565 (CPIAUCSL) triggers central bank tightening expectations, reducing equity risk appetite and producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 5d returns are positive in 70%+ of periods when CPIAUCSL exceeds 210.565.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp decline in unemployment (UNRATE) below 4.7% signals labor market tightness that accelerates wage inflation, prompting monetary policy hawkishness and negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns are positive in 60%+ of periods when UNRATE falls below 4.7%.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous increases in the federal funds rate (FEDFUNDS) and inflation (CPIAUCSL) signal a tightening cycle with stagflation risks, creating headwinds for equity markets and negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns are positive when both FEDFUNDS and CPIAUCSL rise by >0.5% in the same month.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production (INDPRO) above 113.9019 indicates strong manufacturing demand, driving corporate earnings growth and positive S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 5d returns are negative in 60%+ of periods when INDPRO exceeds 113.9019.

mechanism_narrative: Strong housing starts (HOUST) above 1,229 thousand units signal robust demand for residential construction, boosting related sectors and generating positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns are negative in 60%+ of periods when HOUST exceeds 1229.0.
